content.title: Containers
content.subtitle: View and manage your Docker containers.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure web access to Wraith.
settings.webOnlyDesktop: Settings can only be changed from the Wraith desktop app, not from this web access.
settings.runInBackgroundDescription: Closing the window doesn't quit Wraith: the app stays in the system tray and the web server keeps running. Disable so closing the window fully quits the app.
settings.webAccessDescription: Expose Wraith on the network to control it from a browser, in addition to the desktop app.
settings.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty = open access (not recommended off localhost)
settings.passwordPlaceholderSet: Leave empty to keep the current password
settings.passwordHint: Requested via the Wraith login screen on first browser access.
settings.toastSavedNoPassword: Web access enabled without a password: reachable with no protection on the network.

login.subtitle: Protected web access. Enter the password to continue.
